title: Appointment; compensation
doc_html:
§43. Appointment; compensation

            All members of the board of boiler inspector examiners, except the chief inspector, shall be appointed by the secretary, and shall serve at his pleasure, without compensation.

            Acts 2012, No. 811, §6, eff. July 1, 2012.
doc_text:
§43.  Appointment; compensation
All members of the board of boiler inspector examiners, except the chief inspector,
shall be appointed by the secretary, and shall serve at his pleasure, without compensation.
Acts 2012, No. 811, §6, eff. July 1, 2012.
